description_long: This object is a bolt-action rifle featuring a long, slender barrel and a wooden fixed stock. The rifle is equipped with a prominent telescopic scope mounted on top, designed for precision aiming at long distances. The receiver and barrel are constructed from dark metal, contrasting with the rich brown wood of the stock and fore-end. The trigger guard and magazine area are compact, with the magazine appearing to be internal and flush with the bottom of the receiver. The rifle's overall design is streamlined, with minimal external attachments aside from the scope. The muzzle is plain, with no visible muzzle device attached.
description: A bolt-action rifle with a wooden fixed stock and a mounted telescopic scope, featuring a long metal barrel and a streamlined design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, the wooden stock, and the mounted scope clearly.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the circular lens of the scope above.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the wooden stock and scope from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the rear lens of the scope, with the barrel extending away.
